name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans (up to $1,000), and title loans (up to $25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company operates physical store locations across the United States, including the Jacksonville, FL location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and provides online lending options. They serve customers who need quick access to cash between paychecks or for unexpected expenses.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ranging from $100-$500 with 2-4 week terms; Installment Loans from $100-$1,000 allowing repayment over multiple payments with longer terms than payday loans; and Title Loans from $2,000-$25,000 (offered in partnership with LoanCenter) where a vehicle serves as collateral. All products are available both online and in-store, with same-day funding advertised. The company also offers Western Union services at their locations.

Advance America distinguishes itself through widespread physical store locations, bilingual customer service ("Hablamos español"), extended store hours (9 AM-6 PM most days, Saturday 9 AM-4 PM), and a high customer satisfaction rating of 4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,679 reviews. The company emphasizes quick application processes and staff assistance in selecting appropriate loan products. They require standard documentation: government-issued ID, proof of income, checking account, and Social Security Number or ITIN.

However, customers should understand that Advance America operates in the high-cost short-term lending space. While specific APRs are not disclosed on the website, payday and installment loans from non-bank lenders typically carry rates ranging from 300-400% APR. Title loans similarly carry substantial interest costs. These products are designed for emergency situations only and can create debt cycles if used repeatedly. The company's lending is regulatory-compliant but represents costly borrowing compared to traditional banks or credit unions.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for payday and installment loans
High customer satisfaction rating of 4.9 out of 5 stars from 125,679 verified reviews
Multiple loan products available ($100-$25,000 range) to match different financial needs
Bilingual customer service in Spanish at physical locations
Extended store hours including Saturday morning availability (9 AM-4 PM)
Quick application process with in-store staff assistance
Title loans offer access to larger amounts ($2,000-$25,000) for vehicle owners
Online application option available alongside in-store borrowing
cons: High-cost lending: typical APRs for payday/installment loans exceed 300-400% (not disclosed on site)
Short repayment terms (2-4 weeks) for payday loans create risk of debt cycles
Title loans require vehicle ownership and registration, limiting access for non-car owners
Collateral requirement for title loans risks vehicle loss if unable to repay
No transparent APR/fee disclosure on the website—customers must call or visit to learn costs
best_for: Employed individuals facing unexpected emergencies needing cash within 1-2 days
Vehicle owners with poor credit seeking larger amounts ($2,000+) via title loans
People with checking accounts who prefer in-person lending with bilingual support
Borrowers seeking alternatives to bounced checks or overdraft fees (short-term only)
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals with legitimate emergencies who need cash within 24-48 hours and have no other options (credit unions, family, employer advances). The critical caveat: these are expensive loans with effective APRs typically 300-400%, designed for one-time emergencies only—not ongoing financial solutions. Repeat use signals a deeper financial problem requiring credit counseling or debt consolidation assistance.
services: Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with multiple payment options)
Title Loans ($2,000-$25,000, vehicle collateral-based, in partnership with LoanCenter)
In-store loan applications at physical locations
Customer review platform and referral rewards program

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
